source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two electrodes are spaced apart. They are charged by transferring \( 1.0\times10^{11} \) electrons from one electrode to the other. An electron is released from rest at the surface of the negative electrode. Assume the space between the electrodes is a vacuum. What is its speed as it collides with the positive electrode?
